overall.description: A stabilized first-person walk through a desert canyon wadi with a shallow stream, surrounded by towering red sandstone formations under heavy haze. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow gorge, passing palm trees and vegetation clinging to the canyon walls as the path winds toward a more vegetated area in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon wadi with seasonal stream

events.description: palm trees on left canyon wall come into clear view then begin receding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow stream bed, navigating around small rocks and puddles

entered.detail: steep sandstone cliff with green palm trees and shrubs growing from crevices
massive layered red sandstone monolith rising vertically from canyon floor
shallow muddy watercourse with scattered rocks and reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a narrow desert canyon wadi. The camera moves forward through a shallow stream bed, passing between a vegetation-covered left wall with palm trees and a massive bare rock formation on the right. The heavy haze diffuses the midday light, creating a muted atmosphere as the water ripples around the sandy banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: central canyon corridor with active stream

events.description: camera briefly adjusts path to navigate around larger rocks in stream bed

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the winding canyon, following the watercourse as it curves gently

entered.detail: group of palm trees visible through the haze at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the canyon corridor, the left wall with palms falls behind while the right rock formation looms closer. The stream becomes more prominent in the center of the frame, with the camera navigating around submerged rocks. Through the haze, a cluster of palms becomes visible in the distant canyon exit, suggesting an oasis ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon approach to vegetated oasis area

events.description: canyon walls recede and vegetation density increases significantly ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the narrow canyon section where the wadi opens into a greener area

entered.detail: dense green shrubs and palm trees marking the canyon exit and oasis entry

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens as the camera approaches a transition zone. The left canyon wall exits the frame entirely while the right rock formation recedes into the distance. The stream continues flowing toward a dense patch of oasis vegetation visible ahead through the haze, marking the transition from the barren canyon to a more verdant area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow, hazy desert canyon that gradually opens into a verdant oasis. It begins by navigating a shallow stream bed, passing between a lush, palm-covered wall on the left and a massive bare rock formation on the right under a muted midday light. As the camera moves deeper into the corridor, the left wall falls behind and the right rock formation looms closer, while the stream becomes more prominent as it flows around submerged rocks. The scene then expands as the canyon walls recede and the path widens, revealing a distant cluster of palms through the haze. Finally, the camera approaches a transition zone where the barren rock gives way to a dense patch of oasis vegetation.
